name: @stackra/sdui
purpose: Server-Driven UI runtime — sandboxed expression evaluator, per-node error boundary, action adapter, and HeroUI-powered renderer.
capabilities: Testing subpath with node + expression assertions
when_to_use: Rendering sport-agnostic attribute forms and views from a server-selected attribute set (limited SDUI scope).
when_not_to_use: For general UI use @stackra/ui + Refine; for pure forms without server schema use React Hook Form directly.
